title: User Manual: Forest Clearance Mobile App
introduction: The Forest Clearance Mobile App helps you access and manage forest clearance proposals on-the-go. This app allows you to view proposal status, track timelines, and receive important notifications. With this app, you can make informed decisions and take timely actions from anywhere.
purpose: You'll use this app to stay up-to-date on forest clearance proposals and ensure you're taking the right actions at the right time. This will help you work more efficiently and effectively in your role.
